question: Model a `Library` class that maintains a collection of `Book` objects (from a previous question) using aggregation. Implement methods to `addBook()`, `removeBook()`, and `listAllBooks()`.

test_cases.expected:
--- All Books (including duplicate) ---
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams, Year: 1979
Title: 1984, Author: George Orwell, Year: 1949
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932
Title: 1984, Author: George Orwell, Year: 1949

--- Removing '1984' ---
Book '1984' removed (or at least one instance).

--- Books after removal attempt ---
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams, Year: 1979
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932
Title: 1984, Author: George Orwell, Year: 1949

--- Attempting to remove the remaining '1984' ---
Book '1984' removed (second instance).

--- Final Book List ---
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams, Year: 1979
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932

errors: The `removeBook` method only removes the first occurrence of a book with a matching title, instead of all occurrences, which is a common expectation for removal by title.
